titleStmt.title: SII 15.53: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 53. (B.K. No. 7 of 1927-28.) MALLĀPUR, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the temple of Hanumān.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Dhātu, Mārgaśira śu. 13, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to 1156 A.D., November 26. The Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, however, did not occur on this date.

It records a gift of land for the upkeep of a tank at Nāvidige by Kāraṇada Jōgagāvuṇḍa. Beḷuvaṇige was an agrahāra having Eighty-four Mahājanas and it was situated in Beḷuvala and Eṟaḍaṟunūru. It mentions Duggimayya-daṇḍanāyaka. The inscription is partly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāsrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrimatu pratāpacakravartti traiḷōkyamalladevara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhiprama
rddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaṟaṁ saluttamire . dharayoḷage negaṟda beḷuvala yeraḍaṟu nūṟaṟoḷe Agrahā
raṁ sale beḷuvaṇigeya yeṇbattanālvarppiriyarbhbhuvanaṁgaḷūḷage vara suputraru . kāraṇada barmmagavuḍa
dhāriṇiyoḷu negaḻdanintu gōtrapavitraṁ tānenisi dānadharmmakkāgaravenisiṟdanīgaḷī vasumatiyoḷ . [Āta]
na sati jagadoḷu tāṁ khyāteyenalu negaṟda hollagavuḍiṁge doreyēṁ mātēno rati ge raṁbhege bhūlōkadoḷu do
reyenalke satiyarddoreye . Ā daṁpatigaḷuṁgeseye mahīlōkadoḷintu puṭṭi sale nile mudadiṁdādarade
kētagavuṁḍaṁ mēdiniyoḷu puruśaratnamippaṁtirdda Ātanakulavadhuvenisi strīratnameṁba pesa
resedire tāṁ nītiyoḷu kaṁcigavuṁḍi mahītaḷadoḷu salu suputranaṁ paḍedaḷu . nēkavākyanati
nirmmaḷanasthiranallanaḷipanallaṁ piriyaṁ dhareyoḷage jōgagavuṁḍaṁ peramārttha satyavaṁtaneni siye nagaṟdaṁ .
lalanāratnamaṁdenisiya sale dhareyoḷage pesaradanvartthaṁ tānale kēḷu dēvigavu ḍiye kulavadhu tā
nanise jōgagavuṁḍane dhanya . Ātana māḍida dharmma bhūtaḷadoḷu kaḷasamirppa teṟadiṁdirkkuṁ mātēno kere
ge keyyaṁ khyātige salvanu sarvvamānyaṁ baḍe dhāraṇa
damaged
jana ppa varaprasāda
duggimayyadaṇḍanāyakara
taḷa vrittiyogi paḍedu biṭṭa namaśyada
grahāra nāvidigeya dhārāpūrvvakaṁ jōgagavuḍana kaiyalu pā
dapūjeya koṇḍu sarvvanamaśyavāgi kālaṁkarccikoṭṭaru śrītraiḷōkyamalladēva
varṣada 7 neya dhātu saṁvatsarada mārggasira suddha trayōdasi somavāra vyatīpāte mutta
rāyaṇasaṁkramaṇadaṁdu kāraṇada jōgagāvuṇḍa nāvidigeya keṟege beḷuvaṇigeya
dāriyiṁ teṁka keṟeyiṁ mūḍalu sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭaAṇṇigeṟeya hiriya kōla ma
ttarondu kamma mūnūṟayippattaydu nāvidigeya jōgagavuṇḍasahitaSome space is left blank here.
tamma keṟeya keyya tāve māḍi keṟegikkuvarubaḍagi kammāṟa sa mūṟu mane
ya maṇnumaṁ keṟeya keygekoṭṭaru . Intīdharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi guru
kṣētradoḷu sāsira kavileyaṁ sāsirvvaruṁ vēdapāragarappa sabrāhmaṇargge koṭṭa pu
ṇyaphalamaṁ paḍevaru Intī dharmmamanaḷidāta sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvvaru vēdapāraga
rappa sabrāhmaṇaraṁ svahastadiṁ konda mahāpātakanakkuṁ svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . baradaṁ sēnabōvaṁ sayya
ḍiya kappeyara cāvuṇḍayyana svahastalikhita . lokkiguṇḍiya basavōjana kaṇḍaraṇe
Digital edition of SII 15.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
